codex.label: codex-default
command: import os,time;print('Codex stub task:', os.getenv('AGENT_TASK'));[print(f'codex step {i}') or time.sleep(1) for i in range(1,6)]

gemini.label: gemini-default
command: import os,time,sys;print('Gemini stub task:', os.getenv('AGENT_TASK'));[print(f'gemini step {i}') or time.sleep(1) for i in range(1,6)]
